title: No Upgrade template
description: No upgrade template found in bastion.
body:
# No Upgrade Template found anywhere

No Upgrade Template found anywhere. Which mean it also disable accessing to Netherite gears.

**If you have a pack that allowing accessibility to Netherite gears directly using Netherite or you've disable Netherite Upgrade recipes, without removing Upgrade Template in Bastion. I recommend this pack since they're useless.**
